chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. D – 537 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case (Letter issued) 03.07.2018 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State along with DSP Sohail Ahmed Khan (SDPO Ubauro District Ghotki) and SIP Imam Din (SHO Daharki)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant doesn’t press this Cr. Misc. Application and states that the alleged detainees have already been recovered. In view of such statement, this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
